options.name: --signing
options.description:
The Apple Developer signing identity.
If empty, the application will not be signed.

options.name: --notarize
options.description:
Notarize the app using Apple Notary Service.
If <AppleProfile> is not provided, defaults to "MacOsPublishProfile"

options.name: --plist-dir
options.description:
The directory where Info.plist and Entitlements.plist are located.
If not set, uses the current directory.

options.name: --version
options.description:
Show version.
Note that to use --notarize, you must be signed in with xcrun notarytool:
xcrun notarytool store-credentials --apple-id <your-email> --team-id <TEAMID> --password <app-specific-password> --keychain-profile ""MacOsPublishProfile""
⚠️ You only need to run this once.
After that, you can pass --notarize in MacOsPublish and it will use the saved credentials.
Get this tool at:
https://www.nuget.org/packages/MacOsPublish
Contribute to the project at:
https://github.com/CastelloBrancoTecnologia/MacOsPublish

arguments.name: PROJECT
arguments.description:
The project file to operate on.
The project file must be a .csproj or .sln.
-- output <OUTPUT_DIR>                                  The output directory where the bundle will be generated.
If not specified, it defaults to bin/UniversalBundleApp
